2026-05-01T17:55:00.CONTENT_EN: All car parks at West Kowloon Cultural District are full. Members of the public are encouraged to take public transport to the West Kowloon Cultural District.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Travel related Arrangements / Notes during the Labour Day Holiday

2026-05-02T12:00:00.CONTENT_EN:
Cross-boundary Travel related Arrangements / Notes during the Labour Day Holiday
The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that more travellers would return to Hong Kong via land-based Boundary Control Points (BCPs) later today and tomorrow (2 & 3 May 2026). The TD appeals to these inbound travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time. It is anticipated that the demand for public transport services will be higher during the period and the waiting time would increase. The TD has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand. The TD's Emergency Transport Coordination Centre will continue to monitor the traffic and public transport services at all land-based BCPs, and shall disseminate the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk) and вҖңHKeMobilityвҖқ. 

The public may make use of вҖңHKeMobilityвҖқ to access the snapshots of traffic conditions at the inbound and outbound vehicle plazas of Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Hong Kong Port, and they may also check the real time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts вҖңhzmbzhportвҖқ or вҖңzhuhaifabuвҖқ (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/),inorder to plan their journeys ahead. 

In addition, according to Zhuhai authorityвҖҷs notification, temporary traffic arrangement may be implemented in Zhuhai during return peak to facilitate vehicles traveling to the HZMB Zhuhai Port. For details, please refer to the following link: https://weixin.qq.com/sph/Af2UaMAQCS.
2026-05-02T12:00:00.CONTENT_CN:
еӢһеӢ•зҜҖеҒҮжңҹи·Ёеўғйҷёи·ҜеҸЈеІёеҮәиЎҢзҡ„жңүй—ңе®үжҺ’/жіЁж„ҸдәӢй …
йҒӢијёзҪІй җж–ҷд»Ҡж—ҘзЁҚеҫҢжҷӮй–“еҸҠжҳҺж—Ҙ(2026е№ҙ5жңҲ2ж—ҘеҸҠ3ж—Ҙ)е°ҮжңүијғеӨҡи·Ёеўғж—…е®ўдҪҝз”Ёйҷёи·ҜеҸЈеІёеӣһжёҜпјҢйҒӢијёзҪІе‘јзұІжңүй—ңж—…е®ўй җж—©еҰҘе–„иҰҸеҠғиЎҢзЁӢпјҢй җз•ҷе……иЈ•дәӨйҖҡжҷӮй–“гҖӮйҒӢијёзҪІй җиЁҲеңЁиҝ”жёҜй«ҳеі°жҷӮй–“зҡ„е…¬е…ұйҒӢијёйңҖжұӮжңғијғй«ҳпјҢд№ҳе®ўеҖҷи»ҠжҷӮй–“дәҰжңғијғй•·гҖӮйҒӢијёзҪІе·ІжҢҮзӨәе…¬е…ұйҒӢијёжңҚеӢҷзҮҹиҫҰе•ҶеҠ еј·жңҚеӢҷжҮүд»ҳд№ҳе®ўйңҖжұӮгҖӮйҒӢијёзҪІзҡ„з·ҠжҖҘдәӨйҖҡдәӢж•…еҚ”иӘҝдёӯеҝғжңғз№јзәҢзӣЈеҜҹеҗ„йҷёи·ҜеҸЈеІёзҡ„е…¬е…ұйҒӢијёжңҚеӢҷжғ…жіҒпјҢдёҰжңғйҖҸйҒҺйҒӢијёзҪІз¶Ій ҒпјҲwww.td.gov.hkпјүеҸҠжөҒеӢ•жҮүз”ЁзЁӢејҸгҖҢйҰҷжёҜеҮәиЎҢжҳ“гҖҚпјҢзҷјж”ҫжңҖж–°зҡ„дәӨйҖҡж¶ҲжҒҜгҖӮ

еёӮж°‘дәҰеҸҜйҖҸйҒҺгҖҢйҰҷжёҜеҮәиЎҢжҳ“гҖҚжҹҘй–ұжёҜзҸ жҫіеӨ§ж©ӢйҰҷжёҜеҸЈеІёеҮәеўғеҸҠе…Ҙеўғе®ўи»ҠйҖҡй—ңе»Је ҙзҡ„дәӨйҖҡеҝ«жӢҚпјҢд»ҘеҸҠйҖҸйҒҺгҖҢжёҜзҸ жҫіеӨ§ж©ӢзҸ жө·еҸЈеІёгҖҚжҲ–гҖҢзҸ жө·зҷјеёғгҖҚеҫ®дҝЎе…¬зңҫиҷҹе…§зҡ„гҖҢеӨ§ж©ӢеҸЈеІёеҜҰжҷӮйҖҡй—ңгҖҚжңҚеӢҷ(жҲ–еүҚеҫҖhttps://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)пјҢжҹҘи©ўеӨ§ж©ӢзҸ жө·еҸЈеІёзҡ„и»ҠијӣеҜҰжҷӮйҖҡй—ңжғ…жіҒпјҢд»ҘдҫҝеҸҠж—©иЁҲеҠғиЎҢзЁӢгҖӮ

жӯӨеӨ–пјҢж“ҡзҸ жө·з•¶еұҖйҖҡе ұпјҢзҸ жө·еёӮж–јеӣһзЁӢзҡ„з№ҒеҝҷжҷӮж®өжҲ–еҜҰж–ҪиҮЁжҷӮдәӨйҖҡе®үжҺ’пјҢд»ҘдҫҝеҲ©и»ҠијӣеүҚеҫҖеӨ§ж©ӢзҸ жө·еҸЈеІёпјҢи©іжғ…и«ӢеҸғй–ұд»ҘдёӢйҖЈзөҗ:https://weixin.qq.com/sph/Af2UaMAQCSгҖӮ

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Busy traffic at the vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port

2026-05-03T15:10:00.CONTENT_EN:
Busy traffic at the vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port
The vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port is very busy now. Members of the public who plan to drive their private cars back to Hong Kong via HZMB are advised to plan ahead their journeys, reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing. The public can check the real time situation of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts "hzmbzhport" or "zhuhaifabu" (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)(Chinese only) before starting their journeys.
2026-05-03T15:10:00.CONTENT_CN:

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services

2026-05-03T19:46:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 4 May 2026:
Park Island Transport Company Limited
'Ma Wan - Central' Route:
- Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route:
- Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled
- Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) adds temporary train trips

2026-05-04T06:22:00.CONTENT_EN: In response to the demand, the High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips: 4-5 May: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station: G5680 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station: G5866 From Shenzhenbei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5679 From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5865 Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website or mobile app; appointed travel agents; or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. For train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website or mobile app, or the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
